message: refactor(test): centralize bundled channel test roots

files.patch:
@@ -1,10 +1,12 @@
+import { bundledPluginRoot } from "./scripts/lib/bundled-plugin-paths.mjs";
+
 export const channelTestRoots = [
-  "extensions/telegram",
-  "extensions/discord",
-  "extensions/whatsapp",
-  "extensions/slack",
-  "extensions/signal",
-  "extensions/imessage",
+  bundledPluginRoot("telegram"),
+  bundledPluginRoot("discord"),
+  bundledPluginRoot("whatsapp"),
+  bundledPluginRoot("slack"),
+  bundledPluginRoot("signal"),
+  bundledPluginRoot("imessage"),
   "src/browser",
   "src/line",
 ];
